channel.title: My Car Story With Lou Page
channel.description: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: 1971 Mercury Cougar XR7 Convertible
item.description: Classic elegance shines in the ’71 Mercury Cougar XR7 Convertible. What features set this model apart in the pony car era?

media:content.media:title: 1971 Mercury Cougar XR7 Convertible
media:content.media:description: Classic elegance shines in the ’71 Mercury Cougar XR7 Convertible. What features set this model apart in the pony car era?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: How Was the ’71 Dodge Charger Daytona Made?
item.description: Step into the story of the 1971 Dodge Charger Daytona. What engineering choices gave this muscle car its legendary status?

media:content.media:title: How Was the ’71 Dodge Charger Daytona Made?
media:content.media:description: Step into the story of the 1971 Dodge Charger Daytona. What engineering choices gave this muscle car its legendary status?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: Meet the Magnificent Monkeemobile!
item.description: The Monkeemobile rolls in with show‑stopping flair. What makes this TV‑famous car such a pop culture icon?

media:content.media:title: Meet the Magnificent Monkeemobile!
media:content.media:description: The Monkeemobile rolls in with show‑stopping flair. What makes this TV‑famous car such a pop culture icon?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: 1953 Buick Skylark Exterior Styling
item.description: The ’53 Buick Skylark’s exterior styling is a work of art. What design cues make it unforgettable?

media:content.media:title: 1953 Buick Skylark Exterior Styling
media:content.media:description: The ’53 Buick Skylark’s exterior styling is a work of art. What design cues make it unforgettable?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: 1955 Quin Epperly Streamliner
item.description: The 1955 Quin Epperly Streamliner showcases racing innovation. How did this streamlined design push speed to new limits?

media:content.media:title: 1955 Quin Epperly Streamliner
media:content.media:description: The 1955 Quin Epperly Streamliner showcases racing innovation. How did this streamlined design push speed to new limits?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: 1961 Plymouth Deluxe Suburban Wagon
item.description: Classic lines meet practicality in the 1961 Plymouth Deluxe 2‑Door Suburban Wagon. How did this model capture family style in its era?

media:content.media:title: 1961 Plymouth Deluxe Suburban Wagon
media:content.media:description: Classic lines meet practicality in the 1961 Plymouth Deluxe 2‑Door Suburban Wagon. How did this model capture family style in its era?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: Timeless 1956 Continental Mark II in Burgundy
item.description: A 1956 Continental Mark II shines in burgundy elegance. What makes this luxury coupe a symbol of timeless design?

media:content.media:title: Timeless 1956 Continental Mark II in Burgundy
media:content.media:description: A 1956 Continental Mark II shines in burgundy elegance. What makes this luxury coupe a symbol of timeless design?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: Legendary 1978 Cadillac Eldorado
item.description: Meet the The 1978 Cadillac Eldorado embodies luxury and power from a golden era. What design and performance features cemented its place as a legend?

media:content.media:title: Legendary 1978 Cadillac Eldorado
media:content.media:description: Meet the The 1978 Cadillac Eldorado embodies luxury and power from a golden era. What design and performance features cemented its place as a legend?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: Red Hot Time Machine Rolls Again
item.description: A fiery classic roars back to life, turning heads like it did decades ago. What makes this “time machine” such a powerful link to automotive history?

media:content.media:title: Red Hot Time Machine Rolls Again
media:content.media:description: A fiery classic roars back to life, turning heads like it did decades ago. What makes this “time machine” such a powerful link to automotive history?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: The Sporty & Unique 2004 Chevy SSR
item.description: Part pickup, part roadster—the 2004 Chevy SSR is unlike anything else on the road. What makes this retro‑styled head‑turner such a collector’s gem today?

media:content.media:title: The Sporty & Unique 2004 Chevy SSR
media:content.media:description: Part pickup, part roadster—the 2004 Chevy SSR is unlike anything else on the road. What makes this retro‑styled head‑turner such a collector’s gem today?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: Persistence Pays Off with Olds 442 Convertible
item.description: An Oldsmobile 442 Convertible stands as a testament to persistence. What challenges were overcome to keep this muscle car alive and cruising decades later?

media:content.media:title: Persistence Pays Off with Olds 442 Convertible
media:content.media:description: An Oldsmobile 442 Convertible stands as a testament to persistence. What challenges were overcome to keep this muscle car alive and cruising decades later?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: This 1973 Chevrolet Resto‑Mod
item.description: Classic style meets modern performance in this 1973 Chevrolet resto‑mod. What upgrades transform this vintage ride into a machine built for today’s roads while keeping its timeless look?

media:content.media:title: This 1973 Chevrolet Resto‑Mod
media:content.media:description: Classic style meets modern performance in this 1973 Chevrolet resto‑mod. What upgrades transform this vintage ride into a machine built for today’s roads while keeping its timeless look?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: 1966 Plymouth Belvedere II Garage‑Find 426 Hemi
item.description: Discover a garage‑find 1966 Plymouth Belvedere II with a 426 Hemi. How rare is this four‑speed powerhouse today?

media:content.media:title: 1966 Plymouth Belvedere II Garage‑Find 426 Hemi
media:content.media:description: Discover a garage‑find 1966 Plymouth Belvedere II with a 426 Hemi. How rare is this four‑speed powerhouse today?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: 1970 Superbird: Roaring into History
item.description: Roar into history with the last 1970 Plymouth Superbird, a NASCAR legend turned collector’s prize. How does it hold its place today?

media:content.media:title: 1970 Superbird: Roaring into History
media:content.media:description: Roar into history with the last 1970 Plymouth Superbird, a NASCAR legend turned collector’s prize. How does it hold its place today?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: 1966 Plymouth Belvedere II Showcase
item.description: Take a look at the 1966 Plymouth Belvedere II, a classic muscle car with enduring appeal. What makes it a garage‑find favorite?

media:content.media:title: 1966 Plymouth Belvedere II Showcase
media:content.media:description: Take a look at the 1966 Plymouth Belvedere II, a classic muscle car with enduring appeal. What makes it a garage‑find favorite?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: Inside a Time Capsule: 1973 Pontiac Grand Am
item.description: Step inside a 1973 Pontiac Grand Am preserved like a time capsule. How has it remained so untouched?

media:content.media:title: Inside a Time Capsule: 1973 Pontiac Grand Am
media:content.media:description: Step inside a 1973 Pontiac Grand Am preserved like a time capsule. How has it remained so untouched?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: 10‑Year Rebuild: 1965 Mustang Fastback
item.description: After a decade of dedication, the 1965 Mustang Fastback roars back to life. What challenges and triumphs shaped this incredible restoration journey?

media:content.media:title: 10‑Year Rebuild: 1965 Mustang Fastback
media:content.media:description: After a decade of dedication, the 1965 Mustang Fastback roars back to life. What challenges and triumphs shaped this incredible restoration journey?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page

item.title: 1949 Cadillac: Hydraulic Marvel
item.description: Dive into the luxury of the 1949 Cadillac, a hydraulic marvel of its time. What innovations made it a standout?

media:content.media:title: 1949 Cadillac: Hydraulic Marvel
media:content.media:description: Dive into the luxury of the 1949 Cadillac, a hydraulic marvel of its time. What innovations made it a standout?
media:content.media:credit: My Car Story With Lou Page
